data.content:
Implementation review rejected: bash completion fix only appends to ~/.bashrc, but the checker accepts ~/.bash_profile as a startup path. In bash login-shell setups that do not source ~/.bashrc,  can report completions fixed even though autocomplete still will not load. Add a fix path and regression test that cover bash_profile-only startup wiring (or otherwise guarantee bash startup wiring in the environments the check treats as installed). Validation rerun:
